analysis.summary: NVIDIA continues to show strength as H100 prices surge 40% due to insatiable AI demand, though hedge funds are selling at the fastest pace in 13 years, creating short-term volatility.
keyPoints: H100 GPU prices surge 40% due to supply shortage
Hedge funds dumping stocks at 13-year high pace
risks: Heavy selling pressure from hedge funds
opportunities: Continuous growth in AI chip demand
H100 price increases due to supply constraints

news.title: Nvidia H100 Prices Surge 40% as New GPUs Fail to Meet Insatiable Demand
news.summary: H100 prices have surged 40% as supply shortage continues amid explosive AI demand.
